message:
feat(freeze): Convert arg and local variable operations to Zig

Converted argument operations (16 ops):
- get_arg0-3, get_arg: Get function arguments with bounds checking
- put_arg0-3, put_arg: Replace function arguments
- set_arg0-3, set_arg: Update arguments while keeping value on stack

Converted local variable operations (15 ops):
- get_loc0-3, get_loc, get_loc8: Get local variables with FROZEN_DUP
- put_loc0-3, put_loc, put_loc8: Replace local variables
- set_loc0-3, set_loc, set_loc8: Update locals while keeping value on stack

All operations now use Zig-compatible code:
- if/else expressions for conditional argv access
- stack[@intCast(sp)] for stack manipulation
- qjs.FROZEN_DUP, qjs.JS_FreeValue with proper prefixes
- Block expressions for POP simulation: { sp -= 1; const val = stack[@intCast(sp)]; val; }
- TOP simulation: stack[@intCast(sp - 1)]
